_comment: Real measured results. base_ppl is the standing reference on a fixed >=500-sample held-out eval set; all trained_ppl use the IDENTICAL set. delta_pct = (base - trained) / base * 100, matching gate.compare_to_base(). See REPORT.md.
noise_formula: sigma * C / n (standard DP-SGD, corrected from sigma * C / sqrt(n))

gates.name: Gate 1
gates.verdict: FAIL — clean negative; per-element noise (0.0625) exceeds signal

gates.name: Gate 2 / Arm B
gates.verdict: PASS — batch averaging recovers DP utility (but eps~23 is weak privacy)
